model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + C(year) + DRIVERSLICENSES + UNEMP", merged, weights=merged["perwt"])
sample_selection: yrimmig between 1900 and 2016 and yrimmig >= birthyr
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = birthyr between 1982 and 1997 and yrimmig <= 2007 and (yrimmig - birthyr) between 0 and 16
